content.en:
The Dark Red Domain Ancestor ranked third on the Immortal Holy Gate Supreme Strength List, how powerful it was, she had condensed the Holy Soul long before entering the Holy Soul Realm, and her Holy Soul was much stronger than ordinary Holy Souls, and her own foundation was already very against the sky.

In addition, she is also a very ancient Supreme Domain Ancestor, who has practiced countless secret techniques, and even obtained countless opportunities, raising her physical body to an extremely terrifying level, and she has a variety of holy relics, and her combat power is very terrifying, far from being comparable to the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor.

In terms of strength, she has definitely reached the extreme of the seven-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, as for whether she has reached the six-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, then no one can guarantee it.

After all, on the surface, I haven't heard of anyone who has stepped into the six-step invincible domain ancestor combat power.

And Ye Tian is the first!

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, give me a face, let go of the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, can you?"

The Dark Red Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

"No!"

Ye Tian refused.

No!

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor roared in panic, but to no avail, under Ye Tian's another blow, the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor died completely.

Seeing the fall of the Golden Serpent Domain Ancestor, the Dark Red Domain Ancestor was very angry.

This is the top ten demonic geniuses on the Immortal Holy Gate Supreme List, and losing one of them is a huge loss.

Moreover, she and the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor have known each other for countless years, and the relationship is okay, Ye Tian actually killed the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor in front of her, without giving her face at all.

In the end, though, she didn't do it.

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor is dead, this is a fact, and there is no way to change it.

Although the ancestors had the ability to reverse the life and death of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the price was too great for them to do, so to die was to die.

She didn't want to fight with Ye Tian, besides, Ye Tian had the combat power of a six-step invincible domain ancestor, unless she used her hole cards, she was not an opponent at all.

Bear with it!

"Didn't you do it?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If the Dark Red Domain Ancestor attacked, he would easily kill the Dark Red Domain Ancestor.

In the following days, the Star Soul Sand appeared one by one, Ye Tian took the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate to snatch the Star Soul Sand one by one, some of the Star Soul Sand was too far away, and other Supreme Soul Ancestors were also extraordinary, so they grabbed it as soon as possible, even if Ye Tian was fast, it was too late to snatch it.

But even so, many of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate have also obtained one Star Soul Sand after another.

But they knew very well that this was all Ye Tian's credit, and it had little to do with them.

"Guys, I'm ready to go it alone!"

Ye Tian proposed.

The others don't have any opinions, after all, they have taken a big advantage, and they are embarrassed to continue if they continue.

The Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate agreed, while Ye Tian separated from the Battle Gate Domain Ancestors and went to another area of this treasure land, so as not to have to compete with the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate for the Star Soul Sand, which would not be good.

As time slowly passed, one grain after another of Star Soul Sand appeared, and Ye Tian had snatched a lot of it with his strength and speed.

These Star Soul Sand had a very good effect on Ye Tian's soul holy light refining, if they were taken to the outside world, they could create many invincible domain ancestors, but such a great opportunity, infinite years can only have such a once.

The Primordial Ancestral Realm was only born once in such a long time, and this was also an opportunity for the rise of the major holy gates.

After this time, the major holy realms are afraid that a large number of invincible domain ancestors will be born, but such a prosperous era has nothing to do with ordinary holy lands and sects.

"There are so many treasures that can help the Supreme Domain Ancestor impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and the number of Invincible Domain Ancestors of the major Holy Gates is probably very amazing!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

In fact, he didn't know how many invincible domain ancestors there were in the Battle Gate.

Many Invincible Domain Ancestors were not in the War Ancestor Realm, but had been trained in the outside world, and even left the Dark Sanctuary and entered the boundless Dark Forbidden Realm in search of other opportunities.

Otherwise, if they stayed in the Dark Sacred Domain, they were afraid that they would not have much chance to impact the Peerless Domain Ancestor Realm.

Suddenly.

Not far away, spatial fluctuations were born.

The eyes of many Supreme Domain Ancestors looked there.

"Has another Star Soul Sand appeared?"

Ye Tian began to shuttle over, but the strange thing was that this spatial fluctuation was born, but the Star Soul Sand did not appear immediately.

Before, it was all spatial fluctuations that appeared in an instant with the Star Soul Sand, but now this situation is a bit special.

Rumble!!!!

A golden Star Soul Sand, which was far smaller than the Star Soul Sand, appeared, its volume was the size of an ordinary mountain, but its quality was very terrifying, and the fluctuations it emitted were also extremely terrifying.

"What kind of Star Soul Sand is this?"

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors were stunned.

But someone still recognized it, and immediately shocked: "This is the Holy Sands, a rumored rare treasure that can make the Holy Soul produce a second qualitative transformation, even among the Holy Gate, there are few such treasures!"

"St. Sands !!!"

Many people are crazy, and their eyes are full of greed.

Let the Holy Soul undergo a secondary qualitative change, what is that concept?

Although there are similar treasures in today's Holy Gate, there are too few of them to be used by the disciples in the door, even if they are the Holy Endowment, they are not qualified to use them, unless they are the heirs of the ancestors, but many ancestors are not willing to give birth to any children at all, so the descendants of the ancestors are boundless and rare.

But if one day the Ancestor wants to give birth to an heir, then the incomparably rare resources in the Holy Gate will be given to the Ancestor Heir.

Among them, there are saints, but they don't even think about such legendary things as the holy sands.

At this moment, the strongest domain ancestors such as Wu Xiu and the Dark Red Domain Ancestor were all crazy.

At the same time, those Supreme Domain Ancestors from all over the Holy Soul Realm who looked down on this treasure land also rushed over.

The Holy Soul Sand is not too effective for those Supreme Domain Ancestors who have already condensed the Holy Soul, so if there are other opportunities, those Supreme Domain Ancestors will not come to this treasure land.

But now, the Holy Sands appeared, and those Supreme Domain Ancestors immediately abandoned other places of chance and rushed here one by one.

"St. Sands, it's mine!"

Wu Xiu's eyes were red, directly showing his forbidden body.

Rumble!!!!

Wu Xiu turned into a huge ape hundreds of millions of feet tall, and the aura of his body was extremely terrifying, very close to the six-step invincible domain ancestor, before he was considered to have hidden part of his strength, but now he almost showed it.

And the Dark Red Domain Ancestor was no exception, and the aura of his whole body was also fully displayed, as if half a foot had stepped into the level of the six-step invincible domain ancestor's combat power.

They all struck at St. Sands.

However, the treasure of the Holy Sands also automatically protected the body, and the golden light shattered the means and power of the supreme domain ancestors.

Obviously, it will take a little time to take away St. Sands.
